subject.title: Mathematics Applications & Interpretation (AI)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics: Applications and Interpretation** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **real-world applications of mathematics, statistical analysis, mathematical modeling, and data interpretation**, with a strong focus on **technology use, practical problem-solving, and interpreting mathematical results in context**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | External examination (calculator permitted) | 1h 30min | 2h | SL: 40%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 2** | External examination (technology required) | 1h 30min | 2h | SL: 40%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 3** | External examination (technology required) | N/A | 1h | HL: 20% |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal assessment | 30h | 30h | 20% |

strengths: Clear logical development with introduction, analyses, evaluation and conclusion
Purposeful organization: title page, table of contents, labeled sections and bibliography
Well-structured use of headings that delineate introduction, body and conclusion
weaknesses: Abrupt transitions between some sections (e.g., between ANOVA analyses)
Missing page numbers in the table of contents and misaligned table captions
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Strand assessments place coherence and organization solidly in band 3, with conciseness in band 2. Overall, the exploration is coherent and well organized, but occasional digressions, abrupt transitions and minor formatting issues prevent a higher mark. A holistic award of 3/4 reflects these strengths and weaknesses.

strengths: Generally correct use of statistical terminology and notation (ANOVA, F, MST, MSE, Tukey HSD)
Inclusion of tables of raw data, summary statistics and formulae
weaknesses: Limited use of graphical representations (no boxplots, histograms or residual plots)
Formatting inconsistencies in tables and notation sizing
Occasional unexplained symbols (e.g. âðâ) and blank cells hamper clarity
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Notation and language are mostly appropriate (band 3), but limited multiple representations and some inconsistencies in clarity place the work in band 2. A mark of 2/4 accurately reflects these considerations.

strengths: Use of a self-collected MLB data set and bespoke research question demonstrates independent thinking
Personal narrative (Dodgers fandom) clearly drives the choice of topic
weaknesses: Analysis remains largely conventional with limited novel techniques
Creativity in data visualisation and initiative in methodological extensions is modest
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Independent thinking and personal approach merit band 2, while creativity lies at band 1. Holistically, the exploration shows clear personal engagement but not at the highest level, warranting 2/3.

strengths: Evaluation section identifies concrete limitations (sample size, data exclusions) with explanations of impacts
Reflections link outcomes to understanding of pitch effectiveness
weaknesses: Critical analysis of statistical assumptions (normality, homogeneity) is minimal
Reflection on the narrow definition of a âstrikeâ and its bias is undeveloped
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Depth and connection to understanding align with band 2, while critical analysis remains at band 1. The overall reflection shows meaningful insight but lacks depth, making 2/3 appropriate.

strengths: Accurate calculation of F-statistics, degrees of freedom and post-hoc tests
Appropriate use of ANOVA, Tukey HSD and t-tests at course level
Clear conceptual explanations of MST, MSE and rationale for statistical choices
weaknesses: Omission of intermediate sums of squares (SSB, SSE) reduces transparency
Minor interpretative slips (mislabeling critical value) and transcription issues
Assumptions of ANOVA are stated but not empirically tested
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The mathematics is relevant and used effectively at HL course level, with mostly correct and appropriate application of multiple statistical techniques. Though not fully sophisticated (missing diagnostics and detailed SS breakdown), the work clearly exceeds basic course-level use, justifying 4/6.

strandSelections.reasoning: Choosing a self-collected MLB data set, formulating a bespoke research question and deciding to run ANOVA and Tukey indicate significant independent thinking beyond a textbook example, but depth of insight is moderate rather than outstanding.

Explanations of MST, MSE and rationale for post-hoc testing show solid conceptual grasp.  However, the student does not examine assumptions (normality, homoscedasticity) and provides limited theoretical justification for combining probability of being thrown with strike rate, so understanding is âgood in partsâ but not thorough.

Calculations of F-statistics, degrees of freedom and comparison with critical values appear correct, but there are minor interpretative slips (calling critical value ânull hypothesisâ) and transcription issues in tables.  Thus mathematics is âmostly correctâ rather than flawless or sophisticated.

Most material relates to answering the research question, but duplicated explanations of ANOVA and lengthy narrative about personal fandom reduce conciseness.  Irrelevant or repetitive sentences (e.g., repeated definitions of strike, multiple reminders of significance level 0.05) occur enough to fall short of the âmostly conciseâ 3-mark standard, so a 2-mark judgment is appropriate.

Statistical terminology (ANOVA, degrees of freedom, F-statistic, Tukey HSD, t-test), symbols ( F, MST, MSE, t, \(\bar x\) ) and subscripts are largely correct and used throughout.  Minor typographical glitches (e.g., â$\mathfrak{S}$â inserted without explanation, occasional boldface in data) introduce small inconsistencies, preventing the âconsistent and accurate throughoutâ standard of 4 marks, hence 3 marks.

Explanations are generally understandable, but inconsistencies in notation sizing and occasional missing values (blank cells) interrupt clarity.  The narrative around statistical decisions is sometimes muddled (critical value called ânull hypothesisâ).  Hence communication is âmostly clear with some consistencyââmatching the 2-mark band.

ANOVA, Tukey HSD and two-sample t-test are standard HL-level statistics and are appropriate for the question.  No advanced modelling or regression diagnostics are included, so mathematics is ârelevant at course levelâ but not used âeffectivelyâ in a sophisticated sense (4-6 bands).

The student includes tables of raw data, summary statistics and formulae; these are appropriate but limited.  No graphs (boxplots, histograms, residual plots) are provided, and some tables are poorly formatted or incomplete (Table 4 header repeated).  Thus there is âsomeâ but not âeffectiveâ use of multiple representations.

The evaluation section lists three concrete limitations (small groups, deleted data, strike definition) and explains their possible impact, constituting meaningful reflection, but analysis lacks depth such as quantifying effects or suggesting remedies beyond generalities.

Some initiative is shownâcombining strike rate with frequency and proposing extensionsâbut creative treatment of mathematics or data visualisation is limited.  Evidence fits âsome creativity or initiative shownâ (1 mark).

The investigation follows a recognisable pathâintroduction, two main analyses, evaluation, extension and conclusionâso the reader can see how ideas progress.  Arguments generally build on each other (data â ANOVA â interpretation â Tukey), indicating clear logical development.  Nevertheless, transitions are occasionally abrupt (e.g., sudden move from first ANOVA to second without a linking paragraph) and several explanatory digressions interrupt flow.  Overall coherence is solid but not âexcellentâ, fitting the 3-mark descriptor.

Critical analysis is evident only at a basic levelâacknowledging that limited knuckle-curve data âcould skew resultsââwithout probing statistical assumptions (normality, equal variances) or assessing robustness.  This aligns with the 1-mark descriptor.

Reflections are linked to the studentâs understanding of which pitches are effective and why sample composition matters, demonstrating a clear (though not strong) connection between reflection and mathematical insightâhence 2 marks.

A title page, table of contents, labelled sections, numbered tables and a bibliography show purposeful organisation.  Introduction, body and conclusion are clearly separated, and headings are meaningful.  However, some tables are split over pages, Appendix A is invoked mid-text without clear signposting, and the body occasionally mixes method and discussion, so structure is âwell organisedâ rather than âexceptionalâ.

The studentâs personal narrative (Dodgers fandom) clearly shapes the exploration and the selection of statistical tests, so a âclear personal approach that drives the explorationâ is evident.  Still, the analysis remains conventional, so the highest band is not warranted.

annotations.comment: The research question is clearly focused on the Dodgers, but specify which quantitative measures (e.g. strike rate differences across pitch categories in 2024) to sharpen the inquiry.
The studentâs question is engaging and personally motivated, demonstrating clear personal engagement with baseball analytics.
The table of contents lacks page numbers, making navigation harder; include page references for each section.
Adding page numbers to the TOC will make the structure more user-friendly and highlight the logical development of the report.
The personal introduction effectively shows motivation and context for the project, illustrating genuine engagement.
The anecdotal background is lengthy and reduces conciseness; trim narratives to focus on analytical relevance.
The transition from hypothesis statement to the ANOVA formula is abrupt; insert a linking sentence clarifying why this formula applies.
The MST and MSE formulas are accurately presented with correct summation notation, demonstrating sound mathematical communication.
The narrative explaining MST/MSE is verbose; condense to directly relate each component of the formula to variance interpretation.
Including a numeric example (e.g. compute MST for two small groups) would concretely illustrate how the formula operates.
The symbol $\mathfrak{S}$ appears without explanation; define each notation immediately when introduced.
ANOVA assumptions (independence, normality, homogeneity) and hypotheses are correctly stated, showing solid understanding of Use of Mathematics.
The null hypothesis is written in plain text rather than LaTeX; reformat as $$H_0:\,\mu_1=\mu_2=\dots$$ for precision.
The definition of a âstrikeâ excludes umpire calls and foul-tips; reflect on how this narrow definition might bias strike-rate estimates.
The summary statistics table clearly labels group means, sums, and variances, demonstrating appropriate use of course-level mathematics.
Degrees of freedom and F-statistic are reported but intermediate sums of squares (SSB, SSE) are omitted; include these for transparency.
Table 3âs header text is truncated and misaligned; correct the caption and ensure the full title appears on one line.
The evaluation lists three limitations but omits discussion of ANOVA assumptions (normality, equal variance); critique these to deepen the reflection.
Consider adding diagnostic checks (e.g. QQ-plots, Leveneâs test) to assess ANOVA assumptions and strengthen critical analysis.
Table 1 contains many blank cells which obscure data completeness; either indicate missing values explicitly or remove empty rows.
Consistent table formatting and explicit markers for missing data will improve clarity and mathematical communication.
Notation in Table 3 combines overlines, subscripts, and inline MathML inconsistently; standardize symbols and formatting.
The interpretation of F and Tukey HSD is well-linked to the original question, demonstrating a clear connection between results and understanding.
The conclusion restates prior analysis without new insight; focus on summarising key findings rather than repeating detail.

The exploration is coherent and shows clear logical development
The exploration is highly coherent with excellent logical development
Exceptionally well organized with seamless flow between sections
No appropriate mathematical language or notation used
Communication is partially clear with inconsistencies
Limited use of appropriate mathematical language and notation
Communication is mostly clear with some consistency
Some appropriate mathematical language and notation used
Communication is clear and mostly consistent
Mostly appropriate mathematical language and notation throughout
Effective use of multiple mathematical representations
Communication is clear and consistent throughout
Sophisticated use of multiple mathematical representations
Consistent and accurate mathematical language and notation throughout
Clear personal approach that drives the exploration
Highly personal approach that enhances understanding
Some relevant mathematics at appropriate level
Relevant mathematics at course level used
Mathematics is correct with minor errors
Relevant mathematics at course level used effectively
Sophisticated relevant mathematics at course level

Mathematics is precise and demonstrates sophistication
Sophisticated and rigorous mathematics at course level
